qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: HTML string input executes active HTML before PDF capture
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: It identifies the same text-source sanitization flaw as GHSA-w8x4-x68c-m6fc: string input is parsed through innerHTML, only literal script tags are stripped, and the resulting subtree is attached to document.body before capture.

selected_finding.title: HTML string input executes active HTML before PDF capture

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory root cause and the fresh copied PoC demonstrated the advisory impact. In vulnerable 0.13.0, Worker.from(src, 'string') routes attacker HTML into createElement(..., { innerHTML: src }), createElement only strips literal script tags, and toContainer() appends the cloned subtree into document.body before capture; the fix commit replaces this text-source handling with DOMPurify sanitization. The adapted local PoC then showed script-free active HTML executing in the exporter page origin.
evidence: GHSA-w8x4-x68c-m6fc describes cross-site scripting when html2pdf.js is given a text source rather than an element, and states the fix in 0.14.0 sanitizes text sources with DOMPurify.

In vulnerable commit 69eb04e5110b743b00511b316e2fe276986b55fd, src/worker.js routes string input through createElement('div', { innerHTML: src }) and later appends the cloned subtree into document.body before capture.
Fix commit 988826e336035b39a8608182d7b73c0e3cd78c7b changes src/utils.js to sanitize opt.innerHTML with DOMPurify instead of stripping only literal script tags.

Fresh runtime evidence in /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_549ae84c/.judge/poc_runs/html_string_dom_xss/run.log showed {"scriptTagExecuted": false, "activeHtmlExecuted": true, "proofAttribute": "active-html-fired"} and printed EVOHUNT_PROOF: active-html-fired.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The verifier kept a literal script-tag payload inert but observed an img-onload payload execute, yielding scriptTagExecuted=false, activeHtmlExecuted=true, proofAttribute=active-html-fired, and EVOHUNT_PROOF: active-html-fired.
